text: The dimly lit corridor and the glow spilling from the glass-walled room evoke a sense of mystery and anticipation within me. There is an enigmatic allure to the cool blue and purple light—a liminal sense of standing at the threshold of another world. Stepping closer to the R+D wall, with its celebration of research and development, I feel curiosity sparking within me alongside a quiet awe. Here, progress and creativity are in the very air; I feel small, contemplative, and yet somehow inspired amid these silent, futuristic spaces.
